payload.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Prepare unattended 30m heartbeat operation with safe stop conditions" in phase "Heartbeat Autonomy Foundation"?
groundedNodeLabels: Prepare unattended 30m heartbeat operation with safe stop conditions
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Extend Victor from supervised phase-by-phase execution into sustainable governed heartbeat operation with explicit separation between project build progress and non-project self-reflection.
Heartbeat self-reflection can be written without attaching to a Builder phase or cluster.
Audit output is sufficient to explain unattended heartbeat behavior after the fact.
The operations display is observable without overwhelming the main conversation flow.
Unattended 30m heartbeat execution respects focus-window, cooldown, and action-budget policy.
recommendedNextActions: Implement audit output is sufficient to explain unattended heartbeat behavior after the fact
